vectors.name: Dart (Cost 1 SL)
vectors.notes: Behaves as a ranged attack; after construction roll Ranged to hit.

vectors.name: Dart + Area
vectors.notes: On miss, area still resolves; primary target can take both dart+area (separate Dodges).

vectors.name: Totem (Cost Level×3 SL)
vectors.notes: Stationary focus lasts rounds equal to level; reapplies vectors/effects.
